title: Envixty's Coin Mod
description: A simple coin mod meant for Modpacks
body:
So Envixty's Coin Mod adds Coins to Minecraft 1.19 meant for Modpacks.

 

Note: Before Publishing a Modpack with this make sure you have a mod like [FTB Quests](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ftb-quests-forge) so the coins can be used

Made with MCreator
